NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT HEARING SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR FEB-22-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 01
JUDGE WICK, BETH WILBER - CLERK, BRENDA FIELDS - REPORTER: C/C FOR SETT. CONF, ALL PARTIES PRESENT, CASE SETTLED ON THE RECORD.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AGNEW, MARYLIN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 41 JONES ST, #214, STAYED UNTIL MAR-15-1995, LEASE FORFEITED, WRIT MAY ISSUE, BUT STAYED UNTIL AFTER 3/15/95, 5PM; JUDGMENT FOR THE TOTAL SUM OF $1180.00 WILL BE DEEMED SATISFIED IN FULL IF DEFT. COMPLIES WITH ALL OBLIGATIONS AND VACATES UNIT AND TURNS KEYS OVER TO PLTF. BY ON OR BEFORE SHERIFF EVICTION; (SEE FILE FOR DETAILS).
